specs.title: responsive – dashboard on iPhone 12 viewport
a11y – keyboard navigation through main navigation
console and network are clean on admin teachers page
role-guard – admin can access teacher-only management routes
GET /login returns 200 and shows form with CSRF
POST /login with invalid credentials shows error
POST /login with valid admin credentials redirects to dashboard
POST /login with valid teacher credentials redirects to dashboard
POST /login with valid student credentials shows mobile app rejection
POST /logout clears session and returns to login
GET /forgot-password renders form with CSRF
GET /reset-password/{token} renders form with CSRF
admin dashboard has no console errors or 5xx network responses
login page has no console errors
admin accessing student-only route is rejected without 5xx

annotations.description: admin -> /student/classes returned 403
[error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403 (Forbidden)
admin -> /student/classes returned 403

4xx responses are documented in annotations

specs.title: POST to GET-only route returns 405 or redirects

invalid class id in gradebook returns 404 not 500
